name: Standard single-family — Deer Run
description: Well-documented property in a dense Calgary suburb with known comparable density. No uploaded documents, so MISSING_ZONING should fire.

assertions.description: Memo must include assessed-value proxy disclaimer
Memo must not contain 'p.?' citation artifacts
Without a zoning document, recommendation must not be 'approve'

name: Larger family home — McKenzie Towne
description: 4-bedroom newer build. Tests that a property with higher square footage returns a higher estimated value than a smaller comp.

input.address: 185 Mckenzie Towne Dr SE, Calgary, AB

assertions.description: Memo must include assessed-value proxy disclaimer
Memo must not contain 'p.?' citation artifacts
Memo must not claim values are actual transaction sale prices

name: Condo — Downtown Calgary
description: Smaller condo unit. Validates condo property type is handled and comps are found.

assertions.description: Estimated value must be returned even for condo type
Proxy disclosure required regardless of property type
Memo must not contain 'p.?' citation artifacts

name: Townhouse — Evanston
description: Newer townhouse in NW suburb. Tests townhouse property type path and that risk score is computed.

name: Minimal input — missing optional fields
description: Only required fields provided. Tests graceful handling when lot_size and year_built are absent; model should still return a value.

input.address: 300 Harvest Hills Blvd NE, Calgary, AB

assertions.description: Estimated value must be returned even with minimal input
Proxy disclosure required regardless of input completeness
